findings.description: The source's multi-sheet code example uses `import nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport` — a different package than the `nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport` shown in s1. The knowledge file omits this import entirely for s3, so an AI agent cannot surface this discrepancy to a developer who encounters it.
findings.source_evidence: Source (1テストケースを複数シートを分割する場合 code block): `import nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport;` vs source intro code block: `import nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport;`
